Notice Of Motion To Appoint Corporate Directors
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. CHRISTOPHER L. WANGER, ESQ. of Manatt, Phelps & Phillips, LLP, Tel No. 415-291-7410 appearing for the Petitioners;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS INLAND VALLEY BANCORP AND MUFG UNION BANK, N.A.'S Motion To Appoint Corporate Directors is granted. Good cause has been shown for the motion. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
